intent.operator_problem: 153 Playwright E2E test cases exist but have never been validated against a running application. Triage shows 22 passing, 50 failing, 68 blocked by cascade, and 13 stubs. Core operator workflows have zero browser-level validation, leaving regressions undetected.
intent.pilot_fit: E2E tests are the only layer validating the full browser-to-database stack through RLS. Mocked unit tests have already masked production failures. Without validated E2E coverage, the pilot ships without confidence that operator workflows work end-to-end.
success_outcomes: All 140 implemented test cases pass against local dev server + local Supabase.
npx playwright test exits 0 consistently on a clean environment.
Fixture factories create deterministic, isolated test data with proper cleanup.
No test depends on remote Supabase, manual data setup, or seed data state.
CI e2e job in ci.yml runs the full suite and is blocking on PR merge.
explicit_exclusions: Writing new E2E tests for uncovered workflows
Page Object Model or fixture architecture redesign
Visual regression testing or screenshot comparisons

adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Some specs have deep assertion drift
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Most specs are structurally sound; only selectors and fixtures need updates

adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Would reduce selector duplication across specs
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Scope creep; current tests work without POM once selectors are fixed
Duplication is annoying but not blocking; separate cleanup pass
Adds CI complexity and brittle baselines; not needed for pilot
Requires separate Vercel preview env setup workstream

entities.name: e2e_fixture_factory
entities.description: Test data scenario factories that create company→casino→staff→player→table→visit entity graphs via service-role client

entities.name: e2e_spec_file
entities.description: Playwright test specification file containing test cases for a specific workflow or API surface

entities.name: ci_e2e_job
entities.description: GitHub Actions job that runs the E2E suite against local Supabase in CI

capabilities.name: fix_fixture_rls_and_schema_bugs
capabilities.description: Fix fixture factories that fail due to missing company creation (ADR-043), RLS policy violations on service-role inserts, or wrong login form selectors

capabilities.name: fix_route_drift
capabilities.description: Update URL constants and assertions where application routes have moved (e.g., /admin/alerts → /admin/anomaly-detection/alerts)

capabilities.name: fix_rls_context_for_triggers
capabilities.description: Fix createTestTransaction and createTestMtlEntry which fail because DB triggers require RLS context even from service-role inserts

capabilities.name: fix_pit_page_selector_drift
capabilities.description: Investigate and fix data-testid='table-grid' selector on /pit page — either add testid to component or update test selectors

capabilities.name: fix_assertion_drift
capabilities.description: Update UI text assertions and selectors that have drifted (CSV import row counts, setup wizard step titles, loyalty catalog headings, API route paths)

capabilities.name: promote_ci_e2e_to_blocking
capabilities.description: Update ci.yml e2e job: remove continue-on-error, expand spec list to full suite, ensure blocking on PR merge

where.primary_surface: Playwright test harness and CI pipeline

restrictions: may not write new test scenarios beyond fixing existing ones

trigger_events.name: pre_release_validation
preconditions: all unit and integration tests pass

timing_constraints: Full E2E suite must complete within 20 minutes on CI
Individual spec files must complete within 5 minutes
Dev server must be ready within 120 seconds

business_rules.statement: Only existing implemented test cases (140) are remediated; no new test scenarios are written.
Fixture changes must maintain ADR-043 company-first creation, ADR-024 app_metadata stamping, and reverse FK cleanup order.

Tests must not depend on seed data, remote Supabase, or manual data setup — except shift-intelligence.spec.ts, loyalty-accrual.spec.ts, and loyalty-accrual-lifecycle.spec.ts which retain seed-data dependencies for this remediation pass.
Production application code changes are limited to adding data-testid attributes where necessary; no behavioral changes.
CI promotion to blocking happens only after the full suite passes locally and in advisory CI.

invariants: Test isolation: each test creates and cleans its own data.
Auth fidelity: Mode B tests authenticate through the real login form, Mode C tests use real JWTs.
Fixture factories use collision-resistant identifiers (UUID or timestamp+UUID).
No broad casino-level cleanup sweeps that destroy other tests' data.
decision_notes: Failures cluster into 5 root causes, not 50 independent bugs.
Sequential fix order chosen because shared fixture files would conflict under parallel edits.
Cascade failures (68 blocked tests) will resolve automatically once early-in-serial-group failures are fixed.

loop.action: identifies failure root cause from triage report
loop.system_response: failure is classified into one of 5 root cause categories

loop.action: fixes fixture, selector, or route constant for the root cause
loop.system_response: affected test files are updated with correct values

loop.action: runs affected spec files to validate the fix
loop.system_response: previously failing tests now pass; cascade-blocked tests unblock

loop.action: repeats steps 1-3 for next root cause in priority order
runs full suite (npx playwright test) after all fixes
updates ci.yml to run full suite and remove continue-on-error
loop.system_response: E2E failures now block PR merge

workstreams.name: Quick Wins — Fixture Bugs

root_causes.description: visit-continuation.spec.ts: createVisitContinuationScenario() missing ADR-043 company creation — null value in column company_id
root_causes.fix: Add company insert before casino insert, pass company.id as company_id

root_causes.description: admin-settings.spec.ts: createTestScenario() from test-data.ts fails on player table RLS because admin.createUser() does not stamp app_metadata (casino_id, staff_id, staff_role). Company creation is already present.
root_causes.fix: Add app_metadata stamping to test-data.ts admin.createUser() and admin.updateUserById() calls, matching the pattern in rating-slip-fixtures.ts lines 104-148

root_causes.description: measurement-reports.spec.ts: login helper uses [name='email'] instead of #email
root_causes.fix: Switch to canonical authenticateAndNavigate from e2e/fixtures/auth.ts

root_causes.description: admin-settings.spec.ts uses non-canonical auth: page.goto('/signin') + localStorage.setItem('supabase.auth.token', ...) instead of form login. Both the route (/signin vs /auth/login) and auth mechanism differ from canonical helper.
root_causes.fix: Migrate all three test.describe blocks to use authenticateAndNavigate from e2e/fixtures/auth.ts

workstreams.validation: npx playwright test e2e/workflows/visit-continuation.spec.ts e2e/workflows/admin-settings.spec.ts e2e/measurement-reports.spec.ts --reporter=list

root_causes.description: /admin/alerts redirects to /admin/anomaly-detection/alerts (both routes exist). The toContain('/admin/alerts') URL assertion actually passes (substring match), but getByRole('heading', { name: 'Alerts' }) fails because page heading is now 'Statistical Anomaly Detection'.
root_causes.fix: Update heading assertion to match actual page heading ('Statistical Anomaly Detection'). Optionally update ADMIN_URLS to point directly to /admin/anomaly-detection/alerts to avoid redirect latency.

root_causes.description: createTestTransaction() inserts into player_financial_transaction via service-role but Finance-to-MTL bridge trigger requires app.casino_id/app.actor_id RLS context
root_causes.fix: Use authenticated client (Mode C) for transaction creation, or call set_rls_context before insert

root_causes.description: createTestMtlEntry() inserts into mtl_entry but triggers require RLS context
root_causes.fix: Same pattern — set RLS context vars before service-role insert via rpc('set_config')

root_causes.description: Tests wait for [data-testid='table-grid'] on /pit page which never appears. Either the component doesn't have this testid, or the page doesn't render tables for test scenarios (no active shift, no tables in casino, or missing casino_settings). Affects rating-slip-modal (13 tests), move-player (9 tests), mtl-threshold-notifications (11 tests), and loyalty-accrual-lifecycle (7 tests, 1 reference).
root_causes.fix: Step 1: Navigate to /pit with playwright-cli and inspect actual DOM. Step 2: Either add data-testid to the table grid component, or update test selectors to match actual DOM, or ensure fixture creates the data needed for /pit to render tables.

workstreams.name: Assertion Drift — UI Text and Selectors

root_causes.description: CSV import specs expect '5 rows detected' / '10 rows detected' text — UI wording may have changed
root_causes.fix: Navigate to import page with playwright-cli, inspect actual text after file upload, update assertions

root_causes.description: Setup wizard specs expect 'Game Settings' card title via [data-slot='card-title'] — step titles or card structure may have changed
root_causes.fix: Navigate to /setup with playwright-cli, inspect card structure, update selectors

root_causes.description: loyalty-admin-catalog expects getByRole('heading', { name: 'Reward Catalog' }). The text 'Reward Catalog' exists in reward-list-client.tsx line 196 inside CardTitle, but CardTitle may render as <div> not <h*>, so getByRole('heading') fails on ARIA semantics.
root_causes.fix: Verify rendered HTML tag of CardTitle; if not an <h*> element, change test to use getByText('Reward Catalog') instead of getByRole('heading', ...)

root_causes.description: shift-dashboard-v3-layout unauthenticated redirect test expects different URL pattern
root_causes.fix: Verify actual redirect URL for unauthenticated access, update assertion

root_causes.description: player-360-navigation timeline redirect tests expect HTTP 308 — route.ts may not exist or returns different status
root_causes.fix: Verify /players/[id]/timeline route exists and returns correct redirect

root_causes.description: shift-intelligence API spec uses raw fetch() with hardcoded BASE_URL, may bypass auth or hit wrong route
root_causes.fix: Verify /api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts route exists, update to use Playwright request context

root_causes.description: loyalty-accrual API spec close endpoint returns 401 — needs Mode C auth token in request
root_causes.fix: Add Authorization header to close request

root_causes.description: loyalty-accrual-lifecycle specs fail on close API and fixture creation
root_causes.fix: Fix auth + fixture issues (overlaps with WS-3)

workstreams.validation: npx playwright test e2e/workflows/csv-player-import.spec.ts e2e/workflows/setup-wizard.spec.ts e2e/api/shift-intelligence.spec.ts --reporter=list

workstreams.name: CI Promotion — Advisory to Blocking

root_causes.description: CI e2e job has continue-on-error: true and only runs 2 spec files (player-exclusion), not the full suite
root_causes.fix: Remove continue-on-error, change spec list to full 'npx playwright test', ensure Supabase start includes required services

workstreams.validation: 1. Run full suite in CI with continue-on-error: true for 3 consecutive green PR runs. 2. Only then remove continue-on-error. 3. Include ADR-044 section 12 change-control disclosure in the PR description.

triage_accounting.cascade_assumption: Remaining ~34 tests are expected to auto-resolve as cascade-blocked tests in serial groups. If more than 10 cascade-unblocked tests reveal new independent failures, trigger an amendment per FIB-H section K.
triage_accounting.overlap_note: WS-5 RC-15 (loyalty-accrual-lifecycle, 7 tests) overlaps with WS-3 RLS context fixes. These tests may resolve from WS-3 alone.

required_existing: Local Supabase with all migrations applied
Auth login form at /auth/login with #email and #password selectors
GitHub Actions Docker support for supabase start
ENABLE_DEV_AUTH=true set on dev server for shift-intelligence.spec.ts (Mode A dev bypass)
missing_dependencies: Exact data-testid attribute on pit page table grid component — needs investigation
Exact current text for CSV import row detection — needs investigation
Exact current route for shift-intelligence alerts API — needs investigation
assumptions: Most failures are fixture or selector bugs, not application bugs
Cascade failures (68 tests) will resolve when early serial-group failures are fixed
The 13 test.fixme stubs remain out of scope and will skip cleanly

outcomes.statement: All 140 implemented test cases pass against local dev server + local Supabase.
npx playwright test exits 0 consistently on a clean environment.
Fixture factories create deterministic, isolated test data with proper cleanup.
No test depends on remote Supabase, manual data setup, or seed data state.
CI e2e job runs the full suite and is blocking on PR merge.

open_questions_allowed_at_scaffold: Exact data-testid selector names on pit page components
Exact API route paths for shift-intelligence alerts
Exact UI text for CSV import row detection feedback
Whether pit page requires active shift or casino_settings to render table grid
